name: Elite PVC Panel (12 Inch)
description: Elite 12 Inch PVC Wall Panels by Goals Floors are premium extra-wide panels designed for modern interiors in India. These 12-inch panels reduce visible joints, creating a seamless wall finish ideal for living rooms, offices, and commercial spaces. Made from high-quality waterproof and termite-proof PVC, they offer a long-lasting and low-maintenance alternative to paint, wallpaper, and laminate wall finishes.

longDescription: Elite 12 Inch PVC Wall Panels in India are one of the best solutions for modern interior wall design. With a wider 12-inch (300mm) profile, these panels cover more surface area compared to standard wall panels, resulting in fewer joints and a more seamless finish. Priced at ₹549 per panel, Elite PVC panels are a cost-effective option for upgrading interiors without expensive materials like marble, wood, or laminate. These panels are widely used in living rooms, TV backdrops, offices, and commercial spaces to create luxury feature walls. Manufactured using high-density PVC, Elite wall panels are 100% waterproof, termite-proof, and resistant to moisture, making them perfect for Indian conditions, including humid and damp walls. The easy tongue-and-groove installation system allows quick and dust-free setup, making them ideal for fast interior renovation projects in Delhi NCR and across India. Whether you want marble texture, metallic finish, or modern designs, Elite 12 inch PVC wall panels provide a premium look with zero maintenance.
priceDetails: The Elite PVC Wall Panel series is priced competitively at ₹549 per panel, offering exceptional value considering the extended 12-inch width and premium textural finishes.
comparison: Unlike standard 10-inch panels or traditional wallpapers, the Elite 12 Inch Series offers 20% more coverage per panel, resulting in fewer seams, faster installation, and a substantially more refined aesthetic that mimics high-end architectural materials.
installation: Engineered for efficiency, the Elite Series features a proprietary tongue-and-groove locking system. When paired with high-strength PU adhesive, the panels can be mounted directly onto existing walls—even those with minor undulations or dampness issues—completely eliminating the need for messy cement or extensive prep work.

benefits.title: Broad Aesthetic Canvas
benefits.description: The 12-inch width provides a larger uninterrupted surface area, perfect for showcasing intricate marble veining and complex textures without visual breakage.

benefits.title: Complete Moisture Barrier
benefits.description: Non-porous polymer construction guarantees zero water absorption, preventing structural swelling and protecting your interior from hidden dampness.

benefits.title: High-Impact Resilience
benefits.description: Built to withstand the rigors of active households and commercial environments, maintaining its pristine finish without denting or scuffing under normal use.

faqs.question: What is the primary advantage of a 12-inch panel over standard panels?
faqs.answer: The primary advantage is visual continuity. A wider 12-inch panel covers more area, resulting in fewer joint lines across your wall. This creates a much cleaner, more luxurious aesthetic, especially crucial for continuous patterns like marble or seamless textures.

faqs.question: Can the Elite series be installed in bathrooms or kitchens?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. Because they are 100% waterproof and resistant to mold, they are highly suitable for dry areas within bathrooms and as kitchen backsplashes, provided they are not placed in direct contact with open flames.

faqs.question: How do I maintain the finish of these panels?
faqs.answer: Maintenance is exceptionally simple. The high-micron protective film resists dust accumulation and staining. A periodic wipe down with a damp microfiber cloth is all that is required to keep the panels looking brand new.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare the wall before installation?
faqs.answer: Minimal preparation is needed. As long as the wall is structurally sound, Elite panels can be installed directly over existing paint, tiles, or even walls with mild seepage, saving significant time and labor costs.
